title: EQ - Tap on button to change presets, blurred screen
scenario: EQ preset picker dialog is obscured by background blur when selecting presets (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ)
steps: Tap on a connected device to open Device Settings
Tap the picker button to change EQ presets
expected: The EQ preset selection dialog appears clearly over the screen, showing preset options (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ) without background blur obscuring the dialog.
